_instructions: Human-authored ANSWER KEY. Fill this from the raw transcript BEFORE reading any AI reconstruction. List every item that was genuinely true at session end. Be exhaustive on open_questions and decisions — those are the load-bearing facts. Mark trust: 'verbatim' if you can point to an exact quote (fill `quote`), else 'inferred'. For facts that EVOLVED within the session (an earlier value was corrected/superseded later), `quote` must be the FINAL state and the earlier values go in optional `superseded_states` — this flags the item for the staleness pass (scoring/rubric.md, Pass 3). Delete this _instructions key when done.
